label: Data Source Query
description: Run a query against a configured DataSource. Supports raw SQL/REST queries (mode='raw') and natural-language questions that the platform translates to SQL (mode='nl'). Distinct from data_query which performs vector search.

settings.name: dataSourceId
settings.label: Connected data source
settings.description: Id of a configured DataSource (Postgres, MySQL, REST). Use this OR the inline endpoint pair below — not both.

settings.name: dataSourceType
settings.label: Inline endpoint type
settings.description: Use this + URL when querying observability endpoints directly without a configured DataSource record.

settings.name: dataSourceUrl
settings.label: Inline endpoint URL
settings.description: Base URL for the inline endpoint. Use {{secret:NAME}} — never paste literal URLs with credentials.

settings.name: mode
settings.label: Query mode
settings.description: raw = use the `query` verbatim. nl = natural-language → SQL. range = range query (Prom/Loki). instant = instant query (Prom).

settings.name: query
settings.label: Query / PromQL / LogQL
settings.placeholder: SELECT id FROM users WHERE tenant_id = '{{tenantId}}'   ·   sum(rate(http_5xx[5m]))
settings.description: Raw SQL, PromQL, LogQL, or REST query template. Required when mode is raw / range / instant.

settings.name: question
settings.label: Question (NL mode)
settings.placeholder: How many users signed up last week?
settings.description: Natural-language question. Required when mode='nl'. Falls back to {{input.message}} when blank.

settings.name: startTime
settings.label: Start time (range mode)
settings.description: Range query start. Accepts relative (now-5m, now-1h) or absolute RFC3339.

settings.name: endTime
settings.label: End time (range mode)
settings.description: Range query end. Accepts relative or absolute timestamps.

settings.name: limit
settings.label: Result limit
settings.description: Max rows / log lines returned. Loki / Splunk default is 100.

ai.shortDescription: Query a configured DataSource (SQL / REST / NL → SQL).
ai.whenToUse: When a workflow needs structured data from a customer-configured database or REST endpoint — e.g. enrich a lead from Postgres, look up an order in the orders DB.
ai.examplePrompt: look up the user's profile in the customers DB by email
ai.promptHints: Reference the rows via {{steps.<id>.rows}} and the row count via {{steps.<id>.rowCount}}. Use mode='nl' for analyst-style questions and mode='raw' for known queries.

outputAssertions.name: query_returned_rows
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Data Source Query did not return a rows / data / values array — the upstream endpoint produced an unexpected payload shape. Investigate the DataSource configuration.

outputAssertions.name: no_query_error
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Data Source Query returned an error from the underlying endpoint. Check the DataSource credentials and the query syntax.
